full_text:
Tao Jun 陶濬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tao Jun (陶濬)was born in Moling in Danyang. A general of Wu. During Jin’s invasion, sent to meet the invading Jin forces. Tao Jun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
